response.justification: Strong polyglot engineer with 13+ years of experience, scale exposure at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s), recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work, and solid software-craftsmanship discipline. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, metrics/guardrails design, or bias-detection and rollout-risk management — the core of this Principal role. Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and scope of cross-team systemic ownership also fall short of typical IC6 signals. Worth a screening conversation to probe any uncaptured experimentation or measurement-platform work before deciding.
strengths: 13+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services (Dunnhumby low-latency micro-services)
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator work aligns with the AI-first preferred qualification
Polyglot fundamentals (TypeScript, C/C++, Java, DLang) and strong testing/TDD discipline with teaching and workshop track record
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation, feature-flagging, or measurement platforms used across multiple teams
No evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure, statistical analysis, guardrails, or rollout-risk management
Career level and scope appear closer to Staff/IC5 than Principal/IC6 — limited signal on multi-workstream cross-team strategy ownership

key_factors.factor: Lack of telemetry/metrics and statistical analysis background
Strong polyglot engineering breadth with AI-tooling exposure
